Pebble app setup, Git ignore rules, SDK functions, watch face handling, and project file templates.

## Folders
- **[app](app/README.md)**: Pebble app initialization, configuration, event handling, and compilation rules.
- **[common](common/README.md)**: Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore, including build artifacts and node modules.
- **[lib](lib/README.md)**: Functions for truth evaluation, console logging, SDK package configuration, and build rules.
- **[rocky](rocky/README.md)**: Handles Pebble watch messages, implements a watch face, and includes project configuration and build rules.

## Files
- **[templates.json](templates.json.md)**: Defines file templates for different project types in the Pebble firmware SDK.
